mes.info: mode_name = BMMS mode_macro = MOD_CODE_BMMS namespace = bmms_m
mes.err:
static_volume_err_begin
static_volume_construction_errors_begin coding_err_static_volume_alignment_type_invalid coding_err_static_volume_init_type_invalid coding_err_static_volume_block_size_invalid coding_err_static_volume_block_count_invalid static_volume_construction_errors_end

static_volume_initialization_errors_begin coding_err_static_volume_not_inited static_volume_initialization_errors_end
static_volume_err_end
